evidence: "I like me some DREDD! Great movie, not what I expected. Very harsh, and violent...but some great sci-fi action."
"A fantastic, fun movie full of out-of-this-world creatures and battles that are beyond belief...OF COURSE!"
"It's good for most of the reasons given. It's also bad for the bad reasons given."
"It's a Transformer movie. Seen one, seen em all."
"Just watch, buy it, rent it and view it. BUT more than once."
"It's fun, fast-paced, and has all the cursing & skinny dipping one needs."
"I liked it. Nothing grand, but good story."
"Watch the trailer, and you've seen enough. This movie has no redeeming value."
"A huge Star Wars fan, but somehow, I'd never seen this."
"Forget the nay sayers and just have a good time watching it"
"A fantastic, fun movie full of out-of-this-world creatures and battles that are beyond belief..."
"Great movie, not what I expected. Very harsh, and violent...but some great sci-fi action."
"Not the bible story I was taught for sure. Strange Sci-Fi, not good, won't be in my I'd like to see that again list."
"Watch the trailer, and you've seen enough. This movie has no redeeming value."

summary: The user has a strong preference for sci-fi and fantasy genres, particularly enjoying visual spectacles and fast-paced narratives. They exhibit brand loyalty to franchises like Star Wars and appreciate entertaining content, though they show less concern for production quality and emotional depth.
